title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Accept and Sign the Deed of Donation Being Made by Sta. Santos for Two (2) Parcels of Land Situated in Barangay Tadlac, Los Baños, Laguna with an Aggregate Area of Five Hundred Eighteen (518) Square Meters Duly Covered by Transfer Certificates of
